column1: Jacob Wilson headlines today’s Beat The Streak picks, bringing a scorching 73.2% hit probability to the table as he bats second at home with the platoon edge against Anthony Kay. Wilson’s steady bat and strong matchup in a hitter-friendly park make him a prime choice for extending any streak. Right behind him, Trea Turner leads off for Philadelphia, also enjoying a favorable platoon advantage and a reliable top-of-order role—expect his contact skills to play up against Steven Matz. Brendan Donovan and Roman Anthony both offer leadoff opportunities with the platoon edge, but Wilson’s combination of matchup, order, and home cooking stands a cut above the rest.
